final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a professional gym scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs an "工业风" aesthetic with "阳刚之气" mood — references in the spirit of Brutalist architecture photography, Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style, Tokyo 倉庫系 warehouse-conversion design movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a muscular athlete performing a deadlift, with visible sweat and defined muscle lines
Scene/backdrop: must include a professional gym interior with industrial-style decor
Lighting/mood: needs a cold-toned lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
